channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
TradFi, CeFi, and DeFi are rapidly converging into one financial ecosystem.
On Binance, that conver...
item.description:
TradFi, CeFi, and DeFi are rapidly converging into one financial ecosystem.
On Binance, that convergence is already happening.
Crypto is moving beyond standalone platforms toward full-stack financial ecosystems.
Read more → https://t.co/WpQ4TQd8gL https://t.co/H5ldoDGwaM
--- @binance | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 0
item.author: @binance

item.title: 下午和 @Lakr233 聊未来 AI 的发展，我说了句：「三个臭皮匠（当前的开源模型），顶个诸葛亮（Claude、GPT 等目前的 SOTA）。」期待接下去的发展变化。
item.author: @tualatrix

item.title:
🇫🇷MiniMax Hailuo AI x World Ai Film Festival 2026 at Cannes🎥
Join us at WAIFF Cannes, experiencing ...
item.description:
🇫🇷MiniMax Hailuo AI x World Ai Film Festival 2026 at Cannes🎥
Join us at WAIFF Cannes, experiencing the perfect fusion of AI and cinematic art.
In the picturesque seaside city that lives and breathes film, we'll invite special guests for a series of unmissable events.
#WAIFF #MiniMax #Hailuo
--- @Hailuo_AI | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 1
item.author: @Hailuo_AI

item.title: AI 的东西看得越多，就越喜欢人类（我）画的画 https://t.co/3v0onpIXZd
item.author: @bearliu

item.title: 今天朋友说要看一下我的 GitHub Profile，我自己也很久没关注了，于是看了下，过去一年居然有 6000+提交，主要都是最近贡献的。当然看这个提交就和看代码量一样，都是仅供一笑。 https:...
item.author: @tualatrix
